name: I Bid You Peace: The Rise & Fall of the Frugal Gourmet
original_name: I Bid You Peace: The Rise & Fall of the Frugal Gourmet
overview: The meteoric rise and shocking downfall of America's most famous TV chef, The Frugal Gourmet's Jeff Smith, whose charm captivated millions—until it all came crashing down.
